name: Sidewich Maldwort
description: Proprietor of the Man of Gold, an apothecary tucked in a narrow alley near Hornstoat's squat building and its two-story tower in Lankshorn. Sells unusual potions and common Dolmenwood herbs.
notes: Sells amber nectar (heals 1d4, 200gp — chance of inducing sleep) and devil's grease (psychedelic fungal slime mold with an ultraviolet aura; smells like strange sausage; makes the user intensely aware of their body).

Told the party that spirithame (an herb) can be found a day's walk northwest of Lankshorn. Also pointed them toward Hay's Addle (20-mile stretch along Lake Longmere — useful herbs like Marshwick, but beware a hag), and blood canker near the Mossling domain (heals 1d3 but risks loss of constitution).
Had a prior acquaintance with Farnham Ribblemead, whom he describes as a linguist.
His daughter Sadie was playing by the Nuncle Stones and witnessed Lucien being swept away by small creatures. Maldwort briefly scolded her for it.
